title: fumaria × alberti
intro: Fumaria × alberti, also known as Albert's fumitory or Fumaria alberti, is a hybrid plant species within the Fumaria genus, characterized by its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. It is used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and various skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. Fumaria × alberti is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are taken internally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
